steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast with “but”: imported goods reduce expenses, but high transport costs could eliminate or render ineffective the price advantages for distant consumers. The blank needs a word capturing this elimination.

steps.title: Apply the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Nullify means to make something void or have no effect—exactly what high transport costs do to the price advantages for distant consumers.

Denigrate means to criticize unfairly, misconstrue means to misinterpret, and underestimate means to judge as less important than warranted—none describe how costs eliminate an advantage.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
